title: John Hastings: Do You Have Any Ointment My John Hastings
full_description: John Hastings has had a lot to deal with since 2019. A divorce during Covid. His best friend getting a terminal diagnosis. Bedbugs. Almost losing an arm to an infection. A very public trouser incident. This is a show about truly awful things that keep happening to one person, told with the kind of specificity and dark humour that makes horror funny. Performed at Monkey Barrel Comedy during the 2022 Edinburgh Fringe.
ai_summary: John Hastings recounts a catastrophic run of bad luck — divorce, death, bedbugs, near-amputation, and a massive public accident — with such precision and warmth that the awfulness becomes hilarious.
